name: TALXIS DevKit CLI (txc)
description: Installs the TALXIS DevKit CLI (txc), a code-first toolkit for Power Platform and Dataverse development. When version is 'latest', auto-updates on every container start.

version.description: Version of TALXIS.CLI to install. Use 'latest' for auto-updates on each start.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container includes the TALXIS DevKit CLI (`txc`), which is pre-installed and available on the `PATH`. Use `txc workspace`, `txc env`, and `txc data` commands for Power Platform/Dataverse development. Run `txc --help` for the full command reference.
